name: Souhei Sasahara
description:
**Height:** 164 cm (5'5)

He is a cheerful, friendly, straightforward guy who says what's on his mind without hesitation. He has knows Haru since middle school and he gets along with everyone. Due to his kindness, he is seen by his friends as a popular boy who is always surrounded by people. 
~!In the manga, it is confirmed that he likes Natsume.!~
